reviews.review_description:
good visuals and ideas, I really like the goal and intent.
BUT
it is as another user stated, underdeveloped. First of, no instructions (that should be fixed, add a button above "about" named "instructions). 
For those who try and dont get it:
you have to use your hands, not the controllers, hands turn the color of the bubble (red for addition), the number u grab in left hand is the first of the equation, en in the right the second. so if you have blue hands (substraction) and hold 4 in left hand and 2 in right hand, and then let go (or bring them together and let go, unsure here) then the equation will be 4 - 2 , and you'll end up with a new number, 2. 
couple of dev tips. lose the numbers magnetic attraction to your face, have another point for that, like their starting point, annoying to the brink of rage to have them floating to the face whilst trying to count. do that and it will be SO MUCH BETTER. still lots of work left, but that will fix the main issues. 
like the effort🙏
keep up the good work!

I didn’t really get how it works. After launching App doesn't react on any buttons clicks. Hands are not tracking.
What do I do wrong?

We tried everything we could think of and couldn’t get the app to do anything.  We could only grab numbers.  There was no way to create an equation or choose an operation.  There were no instructions or tutorials, either.  I think it has potential to be good, but it’s too underdeveloped.
